violations.text: The establishment does not employ a person certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is a 24hr. facility with multiple Food Trucks. Establishment is to ensure multiple people are certified in food safety as needed. Food Safety Course to be signed up for as soon as possible. Per the PIC, several individuals are to take food safety course within a month. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

The 3 Bay Sink area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Hand Sink is to be installed in the 3-Bay Sink area. Per the PIC, a hand sink is on hand awaiting installation. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

The establishment does not employ a person certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is a 24hr. facility with multiple Food Trucks. Establishment is to ensure multiple people are certified in food safety as needed. Food Safety Course to be signed up for as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The 3 Bay Sink area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Hand Sink is to be installed in the 3-Bay Sink area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

Per interview of the staff, equipment and utensils are not sanitized after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Procedures for proper washing/rinsing/sanitizing were reviewed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary Ammonium Tablet sanitizing solution for the 3-Bay Sink. Test strips acquired at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2024
